description: Chizuru Yukimura is the daughter of a Japanese doctor who vanishes during a trip to Kyoto. To search of her father, Chizuru travels to Kyoto to investigate his whereabouts but in her search she unexpectedly witnesses a member of the Shinsengumi transform into an ogre. Because of this the Shinsengumi decides to capture her for questioning. ~!It is later revealed that this transformation was actually caused by the "Drug" her father was researching. name: Culumon
description: Culumon's role is not that of a fighter, and his immature antics and over-expressed emotions leave little doubt about this fact. In Digimon Tamers, Culumon is the only Digimon on the protagonist's side who had no tamer.

name: Daikichi Karube
description: Karube is an old friend of Alice back from his high school days like with Chota, who's a waiter in a bar where Alice and Chota get free drinks. He is very short-tempered and doesn't hesitate to use strength in critical situations, but he can be a great leader, is always optimistic, and has a strong will to live. It is known that he got stronger because of a hard childhood.

name: Elena
description: Elena died tragically in the first timeline, betrayed by Grand Duke Franché whom she thought cared about her just like his own daughter, until it came to realization that his biological daughter, Veronica, was still alive. Having been put into a cell against her will, with her baby taken away from her, she returns to the past where everything all started. name: Hana Tsukishima
description: The protagonist. He came from a rural town where telephone signals don't reach. Joined Suzuran as a Freshman and in the First Year War, defeated Amachi becoming the winner. He declared he'd become the leader of Suzuran. Hana is the resident of room 5 at the Umehoshi Household. Helps his friends no matter what. A tough fighter who brought justice to Umehoshi household best friends with the other residents. Eats a lot, especially rice. Nicknamed baldy. He is now a sophomore at Suzuran.
